search.heading: Search Indexers
search.noResults: No results — try a different query or check your indexer configuration.

login.title: Sign in
login.rememberMe: Remember me on this device for 30 days
login.proxyHint: Sign in via your SSO provider

setup.title: First-run setup
setup.subtitle: Create the catalogue administrator
setup.description: Choose a username and password for the single administrator account. You can change either later in Settings.
setup.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

authors.title: Authors
authors.mergeTip: Merge two authors — collapse duplicates into one canonical row
authors.emptyHint: Click "Add Author" to start tracking your favorite authors
authors.deleteConfirm: Delete this author and all their books?
authors.deleteWithFilesConfirm:
Delete this author, {{total}} book(s), AND {{withFiles}} file(s)/folder(s) on disk?

This cannot be undone.
authors.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} author(s) and all their books?

bulk.excludeConfirm: Exclude {{count}} book(s)? Excluded books are hidden and blocked from re-import on the next metadata refresh.
bulk.deleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} book(s)? Files on disk are not removed.

books.title: Books
books.empty: No books in your library yet
books.emptyHint: Add an author first — books are imported automatically when an author is monitored

wanted.title: Wanted
wanted.empty: No wanted books. Add an author to start tracking.
wanted.noIndexerResults: No results found on any indexer.

queue.title: Queue
queue.retryImportHint: After fixing the path remap or moving the completed files in the download client, retry import to reuse the existing download.
queue.removeDeleteFiles: Also delete downloaded files from disk
queue.removeDeleteFilesHint: Deletes the data in the download client. For torrents this also stops seeding. Leave unchecked to keep the files.

blocklist.title: Blocklist
blocklist.emptyHint: Failed downloads are automatically added here to prevent re-grabbing

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.noReleases: No monitored books releasing this month

review.dismissRunConfirm: Dismiss {{count}} review items from run #{{runId}}? This cannot be undone.

indexers.heading: Indexers
indexers.empty: No indexers configured. Add a Newznab indexer to search for books.
indexers.testOk: Connected — HTTP {{status}}, {{categories}} categories, {{results}} results in test search, {{latency}} ms
indexers.testWarn: Connected — but test search returned 0 results. Check your API key permissions and category IDs (HTTP {{status}}, {{categories}} categories, {{latency}} ms)

clients.heading: Download Clients
clients.empty: No download clients configured. Add SABnzbd to enable downloads.

notifications.heading: Webhook Notifications
notifications.empty: No notifications configured. Add a webhook to receive event alerts.

metadata.heading: Metadata Profiles
metadata.description: Books in languages outside the profile's allowed list are filtered out when an author is added or refreshed. Leave the list empty to accept any language.
metadata.formLanguagesHint: Select none to accept any language.
metadata.formUnknownLanguageHint: Some metadata sources (notably OpenLibrary) omit the language on some works. Pass imports them silently; Fail rejects them with a log entry.

rootfolders.heading: Root Folders
rootfolders.description: Root folders are the top-level library directories where Bindery moves finished downloads. Each author can be assigned to a specific root folder; authors without one use the default path configured at startup.

logs.heading: Logs
logs.persistNote: Entries are persisted to the database and survive restarts. Default range: last hour. Change Level to capture DEBUG output without restarting.
logs.bufferNote: Entries are persisted to the database and survive restarts. Default range: last hour.

general.themeHint: Light or dark interface. Defaults to your OS preference on first visit.
general.languageHint: Select the display language for the interface.
general.preferredLanguageHint: Filter search results to the selected language. Releases with detected foreign-language tags in the title will be excluded.
general.autoGrabHint: When enabled, Bindery automatically sends found books to the download client. When disabled, all searches run but you manually initiate grabs from the Wanted page.
general.recommendationsHint: Analyse your library to suggest new books on the Discover page. Runs locally every 24 hours — no data leaves your server.
general.audiobookTemplateHint: Audiobooks are imported as whole directories (multi-part m4b/mp3 + cover stay together). Template produces the destination folder; original filenames inside are preserved.
general.storageHint: Paths Bindery reads from and writes to. Configure via environment variables (or your config file) before starting the container; the running process captures them at startup.
general.audiobookDownloadDirFallback: Unset — audiobook downloads use the main download directory.
general.audiobookDirFallback: Unset — audiobooks are imported into the library directory.
general.scanLibraryHint: Walk the books directory and reconcile files with the database
general.opdsHint: Use this URL in KOReader, Moon+ Reader, or any OPDS client. Authenticate with your API key as the password (leave the username blank or use any value).
general.backupCreate: Create a backup of all Bindery configuration
general.backupHint: Includes authors, books, indexers, and settings
general.logRetentionHint: Log entries older than this are deleted by the daily trim job. Set via BINDERY_LOG_RETENTION_DAYS or here.
general.telemetryHint: Helps the maintainer count active installs. No personal data or library contents are sent.
general.telemetryDetail: Sends install_id (random UUID), version, OS, and architecture to getbindery.dev once per day. Disable at any time.
general.metadataProviderHint: Selects the source used for author and book search. DNB (Deutsche Nationalbibliothek) is recommended for German, Austrian, and Swiss catalogues — it covers German-language publications since 1913 where OpenLibrary coverage is thin. OpenLibrary remains the default for other regions. The non-primary provider is always used as an enricher.

import.csvDescription: One name per line, or CSV columns name, monitored, searchOnAdd. Each name is resolved against OpenLibrary — the top match is added.
import.readarrDescription: Upload readarr.db (typically under /config/readarr.db). Authors are re-resolved via OpenLibrary. Indexers, download clients, and blocklist entries port directly. Run a library scan afterward to match existing book files.
import.hardcoverDescription: Sync books from your Hardcover reading lists. The saved Hardcover API token is used by default; newly selected global-token lists are saved disabled until you enable them.
import.hardcoverTokenOverridePlaceholderConfigu: Override token is hidden. Enter a new token to replace it.
import.goodreadsDescription: One-shot migration aid. Export your library from goodreads.com/review/import and upload the CSV here. Each row is resolved against OpenLibrary by ISBN, then by title and author. Bindery never contacts Goodreads — this is not an ongoing sync.
import.goodreadsShelfHint: Read and currently-reading rows are imported as monitored books, the same as want-to-read.
import.goodreadsResolving: Resolving books… this can take a few minutes
import.goodreadsPreviewSummary: {{total}} rows · {{resolved}} ready to add · {{skippedExisting}} already in library · {{skippedShelf}} filtered by shelf · {{unresolved}} could not be matched
import.goodreadsDownloadHint: Fix the ISBN or title in the downloaded file and re-upload it.
import.goodreadsNoResolved: No rows could be resolved — nothing to import. Try widening the shelf filter or check the unmatched rows below.

oidc.heading: SSO / OIDC Providers
oidc.description: Configure OpenID Connect providers. Users who sign in via OIDC are automatically provisioned a Bindery account on first login.
oidc.fieldCallbackUrl: Callback URL (register this in your IdP)
oidc.callbackUrlEmpty: Enter an ID above to preview the callback URL
oidc.callbackUrlHint: Copy this exact URL into your identity provider's redirect URI / callback URL field. Mismatches cause redirect_uri_mismatch errors.
oidc.callbackUrlNotConfiguredWarning: BINDERY_OIDC_REDIRECT_BASE_URL is not set — the callback URL shown may not match what the IdP receives. Set this env var to the public URL of your Bindery instance.
oidc.testDiscoveryOk: Discovery succeeded — IdP is reachable and the issuer matches.
oidc.testDiscoveryMismatch: Issuer mismatch: you entered {{entered}} but the IdP reports {{discovered}}. Use the discovered value as the Issuer URL.

addAuthorModal.title: Add Author
addAuthorModal.autoGrabHint: Bindery will always fetch the book catalogue. Enable this to also queue downloads immediately.
addAuthorModal.booksTooltip: OpenLibrary's raw work count. The actual catalogue added will be smaller after deduplication, language filtering, and junk-title removal.
addAuthorModal.searchError: Could not reach the metadata provider — {{error}}

mergeAuthorsModal.title: Merge Authors
mergeAuthorsModal.description: Select two authors to merge. The second author's books will be moved to the first, and the duplicate will be removed.

empty.noRecs: Your library doesn't have enough data yet. Add authors and monitor them to get recommendations.
empty.disabled: Recommendations are disabled. Enable them in Settings to start discovering new books.
empty.coldStart: Add more books to unlock personalized genre recommendations.

users.title: Users
users.deleteConfirm: Delete user "{{username}}"? This cannot be undone.

bookDetail.languageUnknownHint: Metadata source did not report a language for this book. It bypassed the language filter.
bookDetail.noIndexers: No indexers configured — add one in
bookDetail.noResults: No results on any indexer — expand Search details below to see why.
bookDetail.excludeHint: Exclude this book from searches and the Wanted page
bookDetail.unexcludeHint: Un-exclude this book from searches and the Wanted page
bookDetail.enrichHint: Fetch narrator, duration, cover from audnex
bookDetail.dangerBody: Delete this book and every file on disk. This cannot be undone.
bookDetail.deleteBookBody2: and every file on disk. Download history will be cleared. This cannot be undone.
bookDetail.deleteAcknowledge: I understand this cannot be undone
